alkylation reagent: alkylation step with 12 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min at room temperature (RT)
cleavage agent: 20 µg trypsin was added for overnight digestion
enrichment method: The solid-phase extraction of N-linked glycosylated peptides
fragmentation method: in both higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) and collision-induced dissociation (CID) mode
instrument: subject to analysis by LC–MS/MS on a VelosPRO orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: high-iron cultures of our study on T. oceanica were grown in the presence of 15N-labelled nitrate
